  - Seguros devem **manter-se válidos durante a aquisição de serviços**.
  - IP pode exigir **a qualquer momento** a apresentação das **apólices de seguro** e **recibos de pagamento dos prémios**.
  - **Encargos dos seguros** são da **exclusiva conta do adjudicatário**.
  - **Franquias** em caso de sinistro indemnizável correm por conta do adjudicatário.
  - Seguros devem ser contratados junto de **Segurador autorizado a exercer atividade seguradora em Portugal**.
  - **Lei aplicável às apólices**: lei portuguesa.
  - **Foro competente**: Tribunal Administrativo de Círculo de Lisboa (renúncia a outros foros).

- **Comunicações (Cláusula 34.ª):**
  - Adjudicatário deve **comunicar de imediato à IP** qualquer alteração estatutária (e.g., sede e/ou escritórios permanentes).
  - Comunicações entre IP e adjudicatário devem ser:
    - **Escritas e redigidas em português**.
    - Efetuadas por **correio eletrónico ou outro meio de transmissão escrita/eletrónica**.
  - Ordens, diretivas ou instruções devem ser emitidas **por escrito**, ou, se orais, **reduzidas a escrito e notificadas no prazo de 5 (cinco) dias** (salvo justo impedimento).

- **Contagem dos prazos (Cláusula 35.ª):**
  - Prazos na fase de execução são **contínuos**, **não se suspendendo nos sábados, domingos e feriados** (regime do **artigo 471.º do CCP**).

- **Legislação e normativos aplicáveis (Cláusula 36.ª):**
  - Aplicam-se:
    - **Código dos Contratos Públicos (CCP)** (Decreto-Lei n.º 18/2008, de 29 de janeiro, na redação atual).
    - **Legislação portuguesa e comunitária aplicável**.
    - **Legislação nacional e da UE** sobre auditorias e inquéritos.
  - Adjudicatário deve cumprir **toda a regulamentação em vigor durante a vigência do contrato** relacionada com as atividades.
  - IP pode exigir **a qualquer momento comprovação do cumprimento das disposições legais e regulamentares**.

- **Idioma (Cláusula 37.ª):**
  - Todas as **comunicações e documentos** referentes à aquisição de serviços devem ser em **língua portuguesa**.
  - **Exceção**: documentos técnicos podem ser apresentados em **língua inglesa**.

- **Foro competente (Cláusula 38.ª):**
  - **Tribunal Administrativo de Círculo de Lisboa** é competente para dirimir litígios, com **renúncia a qualquer outro foro**.

- **Avaliação de fornecedores (Cláusula 39.ª):**
  - IP possui metodologia para **avaliação e monitorização de fornecedores**, disponível em: [Avaliação de Fornecedores | Infraestruturas de Portugal](Avaliação de Fornecedores | Infraestruturas de Portugal).

openapi: 3.0.3
info:
  title: BIA - AI Bot for Public Procurement API
  description: |
    OpenAPI specification for the BIA system - an AI-powered platform for automating public procurement processes including document verification, technical/financial analysis, and report generation.
  version: 1.0.0
  contact:
    name: IP Support
    email: support@ip.pt
  license:
    name: MIT
    url: https://opensource.org/licenses/MIT

servers:
  - url: https://api.bia.ip.pt/v1
    description: Production server
  - url: https://api-sandbox.bia.ip.pt/v1
    description: Sandbox server

tags:
  - name: Authentication
    description: User authentication and session management
  - name: Users
    description: User management and RBAC operations
  - name: Procurements
    description: Procurement process management
  - name: Proposals
    description: Proposal submission and management
  - name: Documents
    description: Document ingestion and processing
  - name: Signatures
    description: Electronic signature validation
  - name: Compliance
    description: Technical and financial compliance analysis
  - name: Reports
    description: Report generation and export
  - name: Audit
    description: Audit logging and traceability
  - name: Models
    description: AI model management and monitoring

paths:
  /auth/login:
    post:
      tags:
        - Authentication
      summary: Authenticate user
      operationId: authenticateUser
      description: Authenticates a user via Azure AD credentials
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: '#/components/schemas/LoginRequest'
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Successful authentication
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/LoginResponse'
        '401':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/UnauthorizedError'
        '400':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/BadRequestError'

  /auth/logout:
    post:
      tags:
        - Authentication
      summary: End user session
      operationId: logoutUser
      description: Terminates the current user session
      security:
        - bearerAuth: []
      responses:
        '204':
          description: Successfully logged out
        '401':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/UnauthorizedError'

  /users:
    get:
      tags:
        - Users
      summary: List all users
      operationId: listUsers
      description: Returns a paginated list of all users in the system
      security:
        - bearerAuth: []
      parameters:
        - $ref: '#/components/parameters/pageParam'
        - $ref: '#/components/parameters/limitParam'
        - $ref: '#/components/parameters/sortParam'
        - $ref: '#/components/parameters/roleFilterParam'
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Successful operation
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/UserListResponse'
        '401':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/UnauthorizedError'
        '403':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/ForbiddenError'

    post:
      tags:
        - Users
      summary: Create new user
      operationId: createUser
      description: Creates a new user account in the system
      security:
        - bearerAuth: []
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: '#/components/schemas/UserCreateRequest'
      responses:
        '201':
          description: User created successfully
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/UserResponse'
        '400':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/BadRequestError'
        '401':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/UnauthorizedError'
        '403':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/ForbiddenError'

  /users/{userId}:
    get:
      tags:
        - Users
      summary: Get user details
      operationId: getUser
      description: Returns detailed information about a specific user
      security:
        - bearerAuth: []
      parameters:
        - $ref: '#/components/parameters/userIdParam'
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Successful operation
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/UserResponse'
        '401':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/UnauthorizedError'
        '403':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/ForbiddenError'
        '404':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/NotFoundError'

    put:
      tags:
        - Users
      summary: Update user
      operationId: updateUser
      description: Updates an existing user account
      security:
        - bearerAuth: []
      parameters:
        - $ref: '#/components/parameters/userIdParam'
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: '#/components/schemas/UserUpdateRequest'
      responses:
        '200':
          description: User updated successfully
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/UserResponse'
        '400':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/BadRequestError'
        '401':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/UnauthorizedError'
        '403':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/ForbiddenError'
        '404':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/NotFoundError'

    delete:
      tags:
        - Users
      summary: Delete user
      operationId: deleteUser
      description: Deletes a user account from the system
      security:
        - bearerAuth: []
      parameters:
        - $ref: '#/components/parameters/userIdParam'
      responses:
        '204':
          description: User deleted successfully
        '401':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/UnauthorizedError'
        '403':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/ForbiddenError'
        '404':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/NotFoundError'

  /procurements:
    get:
      tags:
        - Procurements
      summary: List all procurements
      operationId: listProcurements
      description: Returns a paginated list of all procurement processes
      security:
        - bearerAuth: []
      parameters:
        - $ref: '#/components/parameters/pageParam'
        - $ref: '#/components/parameters/limitParam'
        - $ref: '#/components/parameters/sortParam'
        - $ref: '#/components/parameters/statusFilterParam'
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Successful operation
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/ProcurementListResponse'
        '401':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/UnauthorizedError'
        '403':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/ForbiddenError'

    post:
      tags:
        - Procurements
      summary: Create new procurement
      operationId: createProcurement
      description: Creates a new procurement process
      security:
        - bearerAuth: []
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: '#/components/schemas/ProcurementCreateRequest'
      responses:
        '201':
          description: Procurement created successfully
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/ProcurementResponse'
        '400':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/BadRequestError'
        '401':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/UnauthorizedError'
        '403':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/ForbiddenError'

  /procurements/{procurementId}:
    get:
      tags:
        - Procurements
      summary: Get procurement details
      operationId: getProcurement
      description: Returns detailed information about a specific procurement process
      security:
        - bearerAuth: []
      parameters:
        - $ref: '#/components/parameters/procurementIdParam'
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Successful operation
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/ProcurementResponse'
        '401':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/UnauthorizedError'
        '403':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/ForbiddenError'
        '404':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/NotFoundError'

    put:
      tags:
        - Procurements
      summary: Update procurement
      operationId: updateProcurement
      description: Updates an existing procurement process
      security:
        - bearerAuth: []
      parameters:
        - $ref: '#/components/parameters/procurementIdParam'
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: '#/components/schemas/ProcurementUpdateRequest'
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Procurement updated successfully
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/ProcurementResponse'
        '400':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/BadRequestError'
        '401':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/UnauthorizedError'
        '403':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/ForbiddenError'
        '404':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/NotFoundError'

  /procurements/{procurementId}/documents:
    post:
      tags:
        - Documents
      summary: Upload procurement documents
      operationId: uploadProcurementDocuments
      description: Uploads documents related to a procurement process (Caderno de Encargos, etc.)
      security:
        - bearerAuth: []
      parameters:
        - $ref: '#/components/parameters/procurementIdParam'
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          multipart/form-data:
            schema:
              $ref: '#/components/schemas/DocumentUploadRequest'
      responses:
        '201':
          description: Documents uploaded successfully
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/DocumentListResponse'
        '400':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/BadRequestError'
        '401':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/UnauthorizedError'
        '403':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/ForbiddenError'
        '404':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/NotFoundError'

    get:
      tags:
        - Documents
      summary: List procurement documents
      operationId: listProcurementDocuments
      description: Returns a list of all documents associated with a procurement process
      security:
        - bearerAuth: []
      parameters:
        - $ref: '#/components/parameters/procurementIdParam'
        - $ref: '#/components/parameters/pageParam'
        - $ref: '#/components/parameters/limitParam'
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Successful operation
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/DocumentListResponse'
        '401':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/UnauthorizedError'
        '403':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/ForbiddenError'
        '404':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/NotFoundError'

  /procurements/{procurementId}/documents/{documentId}:
    get:
      tags:
        - Documents
      summary: Get document details
      operationId: getDocument
      description: Returns detailed information about a specific document
      security:
        - bearerAuth: []
      parameters:
        - $ref: '#/components/parameters/procurementIdParam'
        - $ref: '#/components/parameters/documentIdParam'
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Successful operation
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/DocumentResponse'
        '401':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/UnauthorizedError'
        '403':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/ForbiddenError'
        '404':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/NotFoundError'

    delete:
      tags:
        - Documents
      summary: Delete document
      operationId: deleteDocument
      description: Deletes a document from the procurement process
      security:
        - bearerAuth: []
      parameters:
        - $ref: '#/components/parameters/procurementIdParam'
        - $ref: '#/components/parameters/documentIdParam'
      responses:
        '204':
          description: Document deleted successfully
        '401':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/UnauthorizedError'
        '403':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/ForbiddenError'
        '404':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/NotFoundError'

  /procurements/{procurementId}/documents/{documentId}/download:
    get:
      tags:
        - Documents
      summary: Download document
      operationId: downloadDocument
      description: Downloads the original document file
      security:
        - bearerAuth: []
      parameters:
        - $ref: '#/components/parameters/procurementIdParam'
        - $ref: '#/components/parameters/documentIdParam'
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Document file
          content:
            application/octet-stream:
              schema:
                type: string
                format: binary
        '401':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/UnauthorizedError'
        '403':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/ForbiddenError'
        '404':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/NotFoundError'

  /procurements/{procurementId}/proposals:
    get:
      tags:
        - Proposals
      summary: List all proposals
      operationId: listProposals
      description: Returns a paginated list of all proposals for a procurement process
      security:
        - bearerAuth: []
      parameters:
        - $ref: '#/components/parameters/procurementIdParam'
        - $ref: '#/components/parameters/pageParam'
        - $ref: '#/components/parameters/limitParam'
        - $ref: '#/components/parameters/statusFilterParam'
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Successful operation
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/ProposalListResponse'
        '401':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/UnauthorizedError'
        '403':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/ForbiddenError'
        '404':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/NotFoundError'

    post:
      tags:
        - Proposals
      summary: Submit new proposal
      operationId: submitProposal
      description: Submits a new proposal for a procurement process
      security:
        - bearerAuth: []
      parameters:
        - $ref: '#/components/parameters/procurementIdParam'
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          multipart/form-data:
            schema:
              $ref: '#/components/schemas/ProposalSubmitRequest'
      responses:
        '201':
          description: Proposal submitted successfully
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/ProposalResponse'
        '400':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/BadRequestError'
        '401':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/UnauthorizedError'
        '403':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/ForbiddenError'
        '404':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/NotFoundError'

  /procurements/{procurementId}/proposals/{proposalId}:
    get:
      tags:
        - Proposals
      summary: Get proposal details
      operationId: getProposal
      description: Returns detailed information about a specific proposal
      security:
        - bearerAuth: []
      parameters:
        - $ref: '#/components/parameters/procurementIdParam'
        - $ref: '#/components/parameters/proposalIdParam'
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Successful operation
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/ProposalResponse'
        '401':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/UnauthorizedError'
        '403':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/ForbiddenError'
        '404':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/NotFoundError'

    put:
      tags:
        - Proposals
      summary: Update proposal status
      operationId: updateProposalStatus
      description: Updates the status of a proposal (e.g., validate, exclude)
      security:
        - bearerAuth: []
      parameters:
        - $ref: '#/components/parameters/procurementIdParam'
        - $ref: '#/components/parameters/proposalIdParam'
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: '#/components/schemas/ProposalStatusUpdateRequest'
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Proposal status updated successfully
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/ProposalResponse'
        '400':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/BadRequestError'
        '401':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/UnauthorizedError'
        '403':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/ForbiddenError'
        '404':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/NotFoundError'

  /procurements/{procurementId}/proposals/{proposalId}/documents:
    get:
      tags:
        - Documents
      summary: List proposal documents
      operationId: listProposalDocuments
      description: Returns a list of all documents associated with a proposal
      security:
        - bearerAuth: []
      parameters:
        - $ref: '#/components/parameters/procurementIdParam'
        - $ref: '#/components/parameters/proposalIdParam'
        - $ref: '#/components/parameters/pageParam'
        - $ref: '#/components/parameters/limitParam'
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Successful operation
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/DocumentListResponse'
        '401':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/UnauthorizedError'
        '403':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/ForbiddenError'
        '404':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/NotFoundError'

  /procurements/{procurementId}/proposals/{proposalId}/signatures:
    get:
      tags:
        - Signatures
      summary: List proposal signatures
      operationId: listProposalSignatures
      description: Returns a list of all electronic signatures found in a proposal
      security:
        - bearerAuth: []
      parameters:
        - $ref: '#/components/parameters/procurementIdParam'
        - $ref: '#/components/parameters/proposalIdParam'
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Successful operation
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/SignatureListResponse'
        '401':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/UnauthorizedError'
        '403':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/ForbiddenError'
        '404':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/NotFoundError'

  /procurements/{procurementId}/proposals/{proposalId}/signatures/{signatureId}:
    get:
      tags:
        - Signatures
      summary: Get signature validation details
      operationId: getSignatureValidation
      description: Returns detailed validation information about a specific electronic signature
      security:
        - bearerAuth: []
      parameters:
        - $ref: '#/components/parameters/procurementIdParam'
        - $ref: '#/components/parameters/proposalIdParam'
        - $ref: '#/components/parameters/signatureIdParam'
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Successful operation
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/SignatureValidationResponse'
        '401':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/UnauthorizedError'
        '403':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/ForbiddenError'
        '404':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/NotFoundError'

  /procurements/{procurementId}/proposals/{proposalId}/signatures/validate:
    post:
      tags:
        - Signatures
      summary: Validate all signatures
      operationId: validateSignatures
      description: Triggers the validation process for all electronic signatures in a proposal
      security:
        - bearerAuth: []
      parameters:
        - $ref: '#/components/parameters/procurementIdParam'
        - $ref: '#/components/parameters/proposalIdParam'
      responses:
        '202':
          description: Validation process started
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/AsyncOperationResponse'
        '400':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/BadRequestError'
        '401':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/UnauthorizedError'
        '403':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/ForbiddenError'
        '404':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/NotFoundError'

  /procurements/{procurementId}/proposals/{proposalId}/compliance:
    get:
      tags:
        - Compliance
      summary: Get compliance analysis
      operationId: getComplianceAnalysis
      description: Returns the compliance analysis results for a proposal
      security:
        - bearerAuth: []
      parameters:
        - $ref: '#/components/parameters/procurementIdParam'
        - $ref: '#/components/parameters/proposalIdParam'
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Successful operation
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/ComplianceAnalysisResponse'
        '401':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/UnauthorizedError'
        '403':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/ForbiddenError'
        '404':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/NotFoundError'

    post:
      tags:
        - Compliance
      summary: Run compliance analysis
      operationId: runComplianceAnalysis
      description: Triggers the compliance analysis process for a proposal
      security:
        - bearerAuth: []
      parameters:
        - $ref: '#/components/parameters/procurementIdParam'
        - $ref: '#/components/parameters/proposalIdParam'
      requestBody:
        required: false
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: '#/components/schemas/ComplianceAnalysisRequest'
      responses:
        '202':
          description: Analysis process started
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/AsyncOperationResponse'
        '400':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/BadRequestError'
        '401':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/UnauthorizedError'
        '403':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/ForbiddenError'
        '404':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/NotFoundError'

  /procurements/{procurementId}/proposals/{proposalId}/compliance/matrix:
    get:
      tags:
        - Compliance
      summary: Get compliance matrix
      operationId: getComplianceMatrix
      description: Returns the compliance matrix for a proposal
      security:
        - bearerAuth: []
      parameters:
        - $ref: '#/components/parameters/procurementIdParam'
        - $ref: '#/components/parameters/proposalIdParam'
        - $ref: '#/components/parameters/formatParam'
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Successful operation
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/ComplianceMatrixResponse'
            application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.spreadsheetml.sheet:
              schema:
                type: string
                format: binary
        '401':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/UnauthorizedError'
        '403':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/ForbiddenError'
        '404':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/NotFoundError'

  /procurements/{procurementId}/reports:
    get:
      tags:
        - Reports
      summary: List all reports
      operationId: listReports
      description: Returns a paginated list of all reports for a procurement process
      security:
        - bearerAuth: []
      parameters:
        - $ref: '#/components/parameters/procurementIdParam'
        - $ref: '#/components/parameters/pageParam'
        - $ref: '#/components/parameters/limitParam'
        - $ref: '#/components/parameters/reportTypeFilterParam'
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Successful operation
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/ReportListResponse'
        '401':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/UnauthorizedError'
        '403':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/ForbiddenError'
        '404':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/NotFoundError'

    post:
      tags:
        - Reports
      summary: Generate new report
      operationId: generateReport
      description: Generates a new report for a procurement process
      security:
        - bearerAuth: []
      parameters:
        - $ref: '#/components/parameters/procurementIdParam'
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: '#/components/schemas/ReportGenerationRequest'
      responses:
        '202':
          description: Report generation started
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/AsyncOperationResponse'
        '400':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/BadRequestError'
        '401':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/UnauthorizedError'
        '403':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/ForbiddenError'
        '404':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/NotFoundError'

  /procurements/{procurementId}/reports/{reportId}:
    get:
      tags:
        - Reports
      summary: Get report details
      operationId: getReport
      description: Returns detailed information about a specific report
      security:
        - bearerAuth: []
      parameters:
        - $ref: '#/components/parameters/procurementIdParam'
        - $ref: '#/components/parameters/reportIdParam'
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Successful operation
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/ReportResponse'
        '401':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/UnauthorizedError'
        '403':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/ForbiddenError'
        '404':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/NotFoundError'

  /procurements/{procurementId}/reports/{reportId}/download:
    get:
      tags:
        - Reports
      summary: Download report
      operationId: downloadReport
      description: Downloads the generated report file
      security:
        - bearerAuth: []
      parameters:
        - $ref: '#/components/parameters/procurementIdParam'
        - $ref: '#/components/parameters/reportIdParam'
        - $ref: '#/components/parameters/formatParam'
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Report file
          content:
            application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.wordprocessingml.document:
              schema:
                type: string
                format: binary
            application/pdf:
              schema:
                type: string
                format: binary
        '401':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/UnauthorizedError'
        '403':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/ForbiddenError'
        '404':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/NotFoundError'

  /procurements/{procurementId}/reports/{reportId}/validate:
    post:
      tags:
        - Reports
      summary: Validate report
      operationId: validateReport
      description: Marks a report as validated by a human reviewer
      security:
        - bearerAuth: []
      parameters:
        - $ref: '#/components/parameters/procurementIdParam'
        - $ref: '#/components/parameters/reportIdParam'
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: '#/components/schemas/ReportValidationRequest'
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Report validated successfully
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/ReportResponse'
        '400':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/BadRequestError'
        '401':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/UnauthorizedError'
        '403':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/ForbiddenError'
        '404':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/NotFoundError'

  /audit/logs:
    get:
      tags:
        - Audit
      summary: List audit logs
      operationId: listAuditLogs
      description: Returns a paginated list of audit log entries
      security:
        - bearerAuth: []
      parameters:
        - $ref: '#/components/parameters/pageParam'
        - $ref: '#/components/parameters/limitParam'
        - $ref: '#/components/parameters/sortParam'
        - $ref: '#/components/parameters/dateFromParam'
        - $ref: '#/components/parameters/dateToParam'
        - $ref: '#/components/parameters/userIdFilterParam'
        - $ref: '#/components/parameters/actionTypeFilterParam'
        - $ref: '#/components/parameters/procurementIdFilterParam'
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Successful operation
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/AuditLogListResponse'
        '401':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/UnauthorizedError'
        '403':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/ForbiddenError'

  /audit/logs/export:
    get:
      tags:
        - Audit
      summary: Export audit logs
      operationId: exportAuditLogs
      description: Exports audit logs in CSV format
      security:
        - bearerAuth: []
      parameters:
        - $ref: '#/components/parameters/dateFromParam'
        - $ref: '#/components/parameters/dateToParam'
        - $ref: '#/components/parameters/userIdFilterParam'
        - $ref: '#/components/parameters/actionTypeFilterParam'
        - $ref: '#/components/parameters/procurementIdFilterParam'
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Audit logs CSV file
          content:
            text/csv:
              schema:
                type: string
                format: binary
        '401':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/UnauthorizedError'
        '403':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/ForbiddenError'

  /audit/logs/{logId}:
    get:
      tags:
        - Audit
      summary: Get audit log details
      operationId: getAuditLog
      description: Returns detailed information about a specific audit log entry
      security:
        - bearerAuth: []
      parameters:
        - $ref: '#/components/parameters/logIdParam'
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Successful operation
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/AuditLogResponse'
        '401':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/UnauthorizedError'
        '403':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/ForbiddenError'
        '404':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/NotFoundError'

  /models:
    get:
      tags:
        - Models
      summary: List all models
      operationId: listModels
      description: Returns a list of all AI models available in the system
      security:
        - bearerAuth: []
      parameters:
        - $ref: '#/components/parameters/pageParam'
        - $ref: '#/components/parameters/limitParam'
        - $ref: '#/components/parameters/statusFilterParam'
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Successful operation
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/ModelListResponse'
        '401':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/UnauthorizedError'
        '403':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/ForbiddenError'

  /models/{modelId}:
    get:
      tags:
        - Models
      summary: Get model details
      operationId: getModel
      description: Returns detailed information about a specific AI model
      security:
        - bearerAuth: []
      parameters:
        - $ref: '#/components/parameters/modelIdParam'
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Successful operation
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/ModelResponse'
        '401':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/UnauthorizedError'
        '403':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/ForbiddenError'
        '404':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/NotFoundError'

  /models/{modelId}/card:
    get:
      tags:
        - Models
      summary: Get model card
      operationId: getModelCard
      description: Returns the model card for a specific AI model
      security:
        - bearerAuth: []
      parameters:
        - $ref: '#/components/parameters/modelIdParam'
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Successful operation
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/ModelCardResponse'
        '401':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/UnauthorizedError'
        '403':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/ForbiddenError'
        '404':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/NotFoundError'

  /models/{modelId}/metrics:
    get:
      tags:
        - Models
      summary: Get model metrics
      operationId: getModelMetrics
      description: Returns performance metrics for a specific AI model
      security:
        - bearerAuth: []
      parameters:
        - $ref: '#/components/parameters/modelIdParam'
        - $ref: '#/components/parameters/dateFromParam'
        - $ref: '#/components/parameters/dateToParam'
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Successful operation
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/ModelMetricsResponse'
        '401':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/UnauthorizedError'
        '403':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/ForbiddenError'
        '404':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/NotFoundError'

  /models/{modelId}/feedback:
    post:
      tags:
        - Models
      summary: Submit model feedback
      operationId: submitModelFeedback
      description: Submits feedback for model improvement
      security:
        - bearerAuth: []
      parameters:
        - $ref: '#/components/parameters/modelIdParam'
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: '#/components/schemas/ModelFeedbackRequest'
      responses:
        '201':
          description: Feedback submitted successfully
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/ModelFeedbackResponse'
        '400':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/BadRequestError'
        '401':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/UnauthorizedError'
        '403':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/ForbiddenError'
        '404':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/NotFoundError'

  /operations/{operationId}:
    get:
      tags:
        - Operations
      summary: Get operation status
      operationId: getOperationStatus
      description: Returns the status of an asynchronous operation
      security:
        - bearerAuth: []
      parameters:
        - $ref: '#/components/parameters/operationIdParam'
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Successful operation
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/AsyncOperationResponse'
        '401':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/UnauthorizedError'
        '403':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/ForbiddenError'
        '404':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/NotFoundError'

components:
  securitySchemes:
    bearerAuth:
      type: http
      scheme: bearer
      bearerFormat: JWT
      description: Azure AD issued JWT token

  parameters:
    pageParam:
      name: page
      in: query
      description: Page number for pagination
      required: false
      schema:
        type: integer
        minimum: 1
        default: 1

    limitParam:
      name: limit
      in: query
      description: Number of items per page
      required: false
      schema:
        type: integer
        minimum: 1
        maximum: 100
        default: 20

    sortParam:
      name: sort
      in: query
      description: Sorting criteria in the format field:direction (e.g., createdAt:desc)
      required: false
      schema:
        type: string
        default: "createdAt:desc"

    userIdParam:
      name: userId
      in: path
      description: Unique identifier of the user
      required: true
      schema:
        type: string
        format: uuid

    procurementIdParam:
      name: procurementId
      in: path
      description: Unique identifier of the procurement process
      required: true
      schema:
        type: string
        format: uuid

    proposalIdParam:
      name: proposalId
      in: path
      description: Unique identifier of the proposal
      required: true
      schema:
        type: string
        format: uuid

    documentIdParam:
      name: documentId
      in: path
      description: Unique identifier of the document
      required: true
      schema:
        type: string
        format: uuid

    signatureIdParam:
      name: signatureId
      in: path
      description: Unique identifier of the signature
      required: true
      schema:
        type: string
        format: uuid

    reportIdParam:
      name: reportId
      in: path
      description: Unique identifier of the report
      required: true
      schema:
        type: string
        format: uuid

    logIdParam:
      name: logId
      in: path
      description: Unique identifier of the audit log entry
      required: true
      schema:
        type: string
        format: uuid

    modelIdParam:
      name: modelId
      in: path
      description: Unique identifier of the AI model
      required: true
      schema:
        type: string
        format: uuid

    operationIdParam:
      name: operationId
      in: path
      description: Unique identifier of the asynchronous operation
      required: true
      schema:
        type: string
        format: uuid

    roleFilterParam:
      name: role
      in: query
      description: Filter users by role
      required: false
      schema:
        type: string
        enum: [admin, jury, procurement_officer, auditor, bidder]

    statusFilterParam:
      name: status
      in: query
      description: Filter by status
      required: false
      schema:
        type: string
        enum: [draft, active, completed, cancelled, admitted, excluded, pending, validated, invalid]

    reportTypeFilterParam:
      name: type
      in: query
      description: Filter reports by type
      required: false
      schema:
        type: string
        enum: [preliminary, final, technical, financial, comparative, audit]

    actionTypeFilterParam:
      name: actionType
      in: query
      description: Filter audit logs by action type
      required: false
      schema:
        type: string
        enum: [document_upload, document_delete, proposal_submit, signature_validation, compliance_analysis, report_generation, user_create, user_update, user_delete, login, logout]

    dateFromParam:
      name: dateFrom
      in: query
      description: Filter by start date (ISO 8601 format)
      required: false
      schema:
        type: string
        format: date-time

    dateToParam:
      name: dateTo
      in: query
      description: Filter by end date (ISO 8601 format)
      required: false
      schema:
        type: string
        format: date-time

    userIdFilterParam:
      name: userId
      in: query
      description: Filter by user ID
      required: false
      schema:
        type: string
        format: uuid

    procurementIdFilterParam:
      name: procurementId
      in: query
      description: Filter by procurement ID
      required: false
      schema:
        type: string
        format: uuid

    formatParam:
      name: format
      in: query
      description: Response format
      required: false
      schema:
        type: string
        enum: [json, pdf, docx, xlsx, csv]

  responses:
    BadRequestError:
      description: Bad request - invalid parameters or body
      content:
        application/json:
          schema:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/ErrorResponse'

    UnauthorizedError:
      description: Unauthorized - authentication required
      content:
        application/json:
          schema:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/ErrorResponse'

    ForbiddenError:
      description: Forbidden - insufficient permissions
      content:
        application/json:
          schema:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/ErrorResponse'

    NotFoundError:
      description: Not found - resource doesn't exist
      content:
        application/json:
          schema:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/ErrorResponse'

    ConflictError:
      description: Conflict - resource already exists
      content:
        application/json:
          schema:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/ErrorResponse'

    InternalServerError:
      description: Internal server error
      content:
        application/json:
          schema:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/ErrorResponse'

  schemas:
    ErrorResponse:
      type: object
      properties:
        timestamp:
          type: string
          format: date-time
          description: When the error occurred
        status:
          type: integer
          description: HTTP status code
        error:
          type: string
          description: Error type
        message:
          type: string
          description: Human-readable error message
        path:
          type: string
          description: Request path
        details:
          type: array
          items:
            type: object
            properties:
              field:
                type: string
                description: Field name with error
              message:
                type: string
                description: Specific error message
      required:
        - timestamp
        - status
        - error
        - message
        - path

    LoginRequest:
      type: object
      properties:
        username:
          type: string
          description: User's username or email
          example: jury.member@ip.pt
        password:
          type: string
          format: password
          description: User's password
      required:
        - username
        - password

    LoginResponse:
      type: object
      properties:
        accessToken:
          type: string
          description: JWT access token
        refreshToken:
          type: string
          description: JWT refresh token
        tokenType:
          type: string
          enum: [bearer]
          default: bearer
        expiresIn:
          type: integer
          description: Token expiration time in seconds
        user:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/UserResponse'
      required:
        - accessToken
        - tokenType
        - expiresIn
        - user

    UserResponse:
      type: object
      properties:
        id:
          type: string
          format: uuid
          description: Unique user identifier
        name:
          type: string
          description: Full name of the user
        email:
          type: string
          format: email
          description: User's email address
        role:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/UserRole'
        status:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/UserStatus'
        createdAt:
          type: string
          format: date-time
          description: When the user was created
        updatedAt:
          type: string
          format: date-time
          description: When the user was last updated
        lastLogin:
          type: string
          format: date-time
          nullable: true
          description: When the user last logged in
      required:
        - id
        - name
        - email
        - role
        - status
        - createdAt
        - updatedAt

    UserListResponse:
      type: object
      properties:
        data:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/UserResponse'
        pagination:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/Pagination'
      required:
        - data
        - pagination

    UserCreateRequest:
      type: object
      properties:
        name:
          type: string
          description: Full name of the user
          minLength: 2
          maxLength: 100
        email:
          type: string
          format: email
          description: User's email address
        role:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/UserRole'
        password:
          type: string
          format: password
          description: Initial password for the user
          minLength: 8
          maxLength: 64
        status:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/UserStatus'
      required:
        - name
        - email
        - role
        - password

    UserUpdateRequest:
      type: object
      properties:
        name:
          type: string
          description: Full name of the user
          minLength: 2
          maxLength: 100
        email:
          type: string
          format: email
          description: User's email address
        role:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/UserRole'
        status:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/UserStatus'
        password:
          type: string
          format: password
          description: New password for the user
          minLength: 8
          maxLength: 64
          nullable: true

    UserRole:
      type: string
      enum:
        - admin
        - jury
        - procurement_officer
        - auditor
        - bidder
      description: |
        User roles in the system:
        - admin: System administrator with full access
        - jury: Jury member evaluating proposals
        - procurement_officer: Manages procurement processes
        - auditor: Reviews audit logs and compliance
        - bidder: External entity submitting proposals

    UserStatus:
      type: string
      enum:
        - active
        - inactive
        - suspended
      description: |
        User account status:
        - active: User can log in and perform actions
        - inactive: User cannot log in
        - suspended: User account is temporarily disabled

    Pagination:
      type: object
      properties:
        totalItems:
          type: integer
          description: Total number of items
        totalPages:
          type: integer
          description: Total number of pages
        currentPage:
          type: integer
          description: Current page number
        pageSize:
          type: integer
          description: Number of items per page
      required:
        - totalItems
        - totalPages
        - currentPage
        - pageSize

    ProcurementResponse:
      type: object
      properties:
        id:
          type: string
          format: uuid
          description: Unique procurement identifier
        reference:
          type: string
          description: Human-readable procurement reference
          example: PR-2026-001
        name:
          type: string
          description: Name of the procurement process
        description:
          type: string
          description: Detailed description of the procurement
        status:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/ProcurementStatus'
        type:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/ProcurementType'
        startDate:
          type: string
          format: date
          description: When the procurement process starts
        endDate:
          type: string
          format: date
          description: When the procurement process ends
        createdAt:
          type: string
          format: date-time
          description: When the procurement was created
        updatedAt:
          type: string
          format: date-time
          description: When the procurement was last updated
        createdBy:
          type: string
          format: uuid
          description: User ID of the creator
        documentsCount:
          type: integer
          description: Number of documents associated with this procurement
        proposalsCount:
          type: integer
          description: Number of proposals submitted for this procurement
        adjudicationCriteria:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/AdjudicationCriterion'
      required:
        - id
        - reference
        - name
        - status
        - type
        - startDate
        - endDate
        - createdAt
        - updatedAt
        - createdBy
        - documentsCount
        - proposalsCount

    ProcurementListResponse:
      type: object
      properties:
        data:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/ProcurementResponse'
        pagination:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/Pagination'
      required:
        - data
        - pagination

    ProcurementCreateRequest:
      type: object
      properties:
        reference:
          type: string
          description: Human-readable procurement reference
          example: PR-2026-001
          minLength: 5
          maxLength: 50
        name:
          type: string
          description: Name of the procurement process
          minLength: 2
          maxLength: 100
        description:
          type: string
          description: Detailed description of the procurement
          maxLength: 2000
        type:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/ProcurementType'
        startDate:
          type: string
          format: date
          description: When the procurement process starts
        endDate:
          type: string
          format: date
          description: When the procurement process ends
        adjudicationCriteria:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/AdjudicationCriterion'
          minItems: 1
      required:
        - reference
        - name
        - type
        - startDate
        - endDate
        - adjudicationCriteria

    ProcurementUpdateRequest:
      type: object
      properties:
        name:
          type: string
          description: Name of the procurement process
          minLength: 2
          maxLength: 100
        description:
          type: string
          description: Detailed description of the procurement
          maxLength: 2000
        status:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/ProcurementStatus'
        startDate:
          type: string
          format: date
          description: When the procurement process starts
        endDate:
          type: string
          format: date
          description: When the procurement process ends
        adjudicationCriteria:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/AdjudicationCriterion'
          minItems: 1

    ProcurementStatus:
      type: string
      enum:
        - draft
        - active
        - completed
        - cancelled
      description: |
        Procurement process status:
        - draft: Procurement is being set up
        - active: Procurement is open for proposals
        - completed: Procurement process is finished
        - cancelled: Procurement was cancelled

    ProcurementType:
      type: string
      enum:
        - public_work
        - supply
        - service
        - concession
        - framework_agreement
      description: |
        Type of procurement process:
        - public_work: Public works contract
        - supply: Supply contract
        - service: Service contract
        - concession: Concession contract
        - framework_agreement: Framework agreement

    AdjudicationCriterion:
      type: object
      properties:
        id:
          type: string
          format: uuid
          description: Unique criterion identifier
        name:
          type: string
          description: Name of the criterion
        description:
          type: string
          description: Detailed description of the criterion
        type:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/CriterionType'
        weight:
          type: number
          format: float
          minimum: 0
          maximum: 1
          description: Weight of this criterion in the overall evaluation (0-1)
        minimumScore:
          type: number
          format: float
          minimum: 0
          maximum: 100
          description: Minimum required score for this criterion
        targetScore:
          type: number
          format: float
          minimum: 0
          maximum: 100
          description: Target score for this criterion
      required:
        - name
        - type
        - weight

    CriterionType:
      type: string
      enum:
        - technical
        - financial
        - legal
        - environmental
        - social
      description: |
        Type of adjudication criterion:
        - technical: Technical requirements
        - financial: Financial aspects
        - legal: Legal compliance
        - environmental: Environmental considerations
        - social: Social impact

    DocumentResponse:
      type: object
      properties:
        id:
          type: string
          format: uuid
          description: Unique document identifier
        name:
          type: string
          description: Original filename
        type:

        format:

        size:

          $ref: '#/components/schemas/DocumentStatus'

          type: string
          format: date-time

        processedDate:
          type: string
          format: date-time
          nullable: true
          description: When the document was processed
        pages:
          type: integer
          nullable: true
          description: Number of pages in the document
        wordCount:
          type: integer
          nullable: true
          description: Number of words in the document
        hash:
          type: string
          description: SHA-256 hash of the document content
        metadata:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/DocumentMetadata'
        processingErrors:
          type: array
          items:
            type: string
          nullable: true
          description: List of errors encountered during processing
      required:
        - id
        - name
        - type
        - format
        - size
        - status
        - uploadDate
        - hash

    DocumentListResponse:
      type: object
      properties:
        data:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/DocumentResponse'
        pagination:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/Pagination'
      required:
        - data
        - pagination

    DocumentUploadRequest:
      type: object

    DocumentType:

        - financial_proposal
        - technical_proposal
        - deucp
        - power_of_attorney
        - consortium_agreement
        - other
      description: |
        Type of document:
        - caderno_encargos: Caderno de Encargos (Tender Specifications)
        - technical_specification: Technical specifications
        - financial_proposal: Financial proposal
        - technical_proposal: Technical proposal
        - deucp: DEUCP (European Single Procurement Document)
        - power_of_attorney: Power of attorney document
        - consortium_agreement: Consortium agreement
        - other: Other document type

    DocumentStatus:
      type: string
      enum:
        - uploaded
        - processing
        - processed
        - error
      description: |
        Document processing status:
        - uploaded: Document uploaded but not processed
        - processing: Document is being processed
        - processed: Document processed successfully
        - error: Error occurred during processing

    DocumentMetadata:
      type: object
      properties:
        author:
          type: string
          nullable: true
          description: Document author
        title:
          type: string
          nullable: true
          description: Document title
        subject:
          type: string
          nullable: true
          description: Document subject
        keywords:
          type: array
          items:
            type: string
          nullable: true
          description: Document keywords
        created:
          type: string
          format: date-time
          nullable: true
          description: When the document was created
        modified:
          type: string
          format: date-time
          nullable: true
          description: When the document was last modified
        language:
          type: string
          nullable: true
          description: Document language (ISO 639-1 code)
        pageCount:
          type: integer
          nullable: true
          description: Number of pages
        wordCount:
          type: integer
          nullable: true
          description: Number of words
        characterCount:
          type: integer
          nullable: true
          description: Number of characters

    ProposalResponse:
      type: object
      properties:
        id:
          type: string
          format: uuid
          description: Unique proposal identifier
        procurementId:
          type: string
          format: uuid
          description: Associated procurement process ID
        reference:
          type: string
          description: Human-readable proposal reference
          example: P-2026-001-01
        bidderName:
          type: string
          description: Name of the bidding entity
        bidderId:
          type: string
          nullable: true
          description: Unique identifier of the bidder
        status:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/ProposalStatus'
        submissionDate:
          type: string
          format: date-time
          description: When the proposal was submitted
        validationDate:
          type: string
          format: date-time
          nullable: true
          description: When the proposal was validated
        technicalScore:
          type: number
          format: float
          nullable: true
          minimum: 0
          maximum: 100
          description: Technical evaluation score (0-100)
        financialScore:
          type: number
          format: float
          nullable: true
          minimum: 0
          maximum: 100
          description: Financial evaluation score (0-100)
        overallScore:
          type: number
          format: float
          nullable: true
          minimum: 0
          maximum: 100
          description: Overall evaluation score (0-100)
        price:
          type: number
          format: double
          nullable: true
          description: Proposed price
        signatureStatus:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/SignatureStatus'
        documentsCount:
          type: integer
          description: Number of documents in the proposal
        exclusionReasons:
          type: array
          items:
            type: string
          nullable: true
          description: Reasons for proposal exclusion (if excluded)
        createdAt:
          type: string
          format: date-time
          description: When the proposal record was created
        updatedAt:
          type: string
          format: date-time
          description: When the proposal record was last updated
      required:
        - id
        - procurementId
        - reference
        - bidderName
        - status
        - submissionDate
        - documentsCount
        - createdAt
        - updatedAt

    ProposalListResponse:
      type: object
      properties:
        data:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/ProposalResponse'
        pagination:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/Pagination'
      required:
        - data
        - pagination

    ProposalSubmitRequest:
      type: object
      properties:
        reference:
          type: string
          description: Human-readable proposal reference
          example: P-2026-001-01
          minLength: 5
          maxLength: 50
        bidderName:
          type: string
          description: Name of the bidding entity
          minLength: 2
          maxLength: 100
        bidderId:
          type: string
          nullable: true
          description: Unique identifier of the bidder
        documents:
          type: array
          items:
            type: string
            format: binary
          description: Proposal documents to upload
          minItems: 1
        metadata:
          type: object
          additionalProperties:
            type: string
          description: Additional metadata about the proposal
      required:
        - reference
        - bidderName
        - documents

    ProposalStatus:
      type: string
      enum:
        - submitted
        - received
        - under_review
        - validated
        - excluded
        - admitted
      description: |
        Proposal status:
        - submitted: Proposal submitted by bidder
        - received: Proposal received and acknowledged
        - under_review: Proposal is being reviewed
        - validated: Proposal validated by jury
        - excluded: Proposal excluded from process
        - admitted: Proposal admitted to evaluation

    ProposalStatusUpdateRequest:
      type: object
      properties:
        status:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/ProposalStatus'
        exclusionReasons:
          type: array
          items:
            type: string
          nullable: true
          description: Reasons for exclusion (required if status is 'excluded')
        notes:
          type: string
          nullable: true
          description: Additional notes about the status change
      required:
        - status

    SignatureValidationResponse:
      type: object
      properties:
        id:
          type: string
          format: uuid
          description: Unique signature identifier
        proposalId:
          type: string
          format: uuid
          description: Associated proposal ID
        documentId:
          type: string
          format: uuid
          description: Associated document ID
        status:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/SignatureStatus'
        certificate:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/CertificateDetails'
        validationDetails:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/SignatureValidationDetails'
        validationDate:
          type: string
          format: date-time
          description: When the signature was validated
        createdAt:
          type: string
          format: date-time
          description: When the validation record was created
      required:
        - id
        - proposalId
        - documentId
        - status
        - validationDate
        - createdAt

    SignatureListResponse:
      type: object
      properties:
        data:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/SignatureValidationResponse'
        pagination:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/Pagination'
      required:
        - data
        - pagination

    SignatureStatus:
      type: string
      enum:
        - not_validated
        - validating
        - valid
        - invalid
        - expired
        - revoked
        - trusted
        - untrusted
        - error
      description: |
        Electronic signature validation status:
        - not_validated: Signature not yet validated
        - validating: Signature validation in progress
        - valid: Signature is valid
        - invalid: Signature is invalid
        - expired: Certificate has expired
        - revoked: Certificate has been revoked
        - trusted: Signature is from a trusted source
        - untrusted: Signature is from an untrusted source
        - error: Error occurred during validation

    CertificateDetails:
      type: object
      properties:
        subject:
          type: string
          description: Certificate subject (DN)
        issuer:
          type: string
          description: Certificate issuer (DN)
        serialNumber:
          type: string
          description: Certificate serial number
        validFrom:
          type: string
          format: date-time
          description: Certificate validity start date
        validTo:
          type: string
          format: date-time
          description: Certificate validity end date
        signatureAlgorithm:
          type: string
          description: Signature algorithm used
        publicKeyAlgorithm:
          type: string
          description: Public key algorithm
        keyUsage:
          type: array
          items:
            type: string
          description: Key usage extensions
        extendedKeyUsage:
          type: array
          items:
            type: string
          description: Extended key usage extensions
        subjectAlternativeNames:
          type: array
          items:
            type: string
          description: Subject alternative names
        professionalAttributes:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/ProfessionalAttribute'
          description: Professional attributes from the certificate
      required:
        - subject
        - issuer
        - serialNumber
        - validFrom
        - validTo
        - signatureAlgorithm
        - publicKeyAlgorithm

    ProfessionalAttribute:
      type: object
      properties:
        type:
          type: string
          description: Type of professional attribute
          example: "SCAP"
        name:
          type: string
          description: Name of the attribute
          example: "Gerente"
        value:
          type: string
          description: Value of the attribute
      required:
        - type
        - name

    SignatureValidationDetails:
      type: object
      properties:
        signatureType:
          type: string
          description: Type of signature (e.g., "AdES", "PAdES", "XAdES")
        signatureLevel:
          type: string
          description: Signature level (e.g., "BES", "EPES", "QES")
        trustChain:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/TrustChainCertificate'
          description: Certificate trust chain
        ocspResponse:
          type: string
          nullable: true
          description: Base64-encoded OCSP response
        crlCheck:
          type: boolean
          nullable: true
          description: Whether CRL was checked
        timestamp:
          type: string
          format: date-time
          nullable: true
          description: Signature timestamp
        byteRange:
          type: array
          items:
            type: integer
          description: Byte range covered by the signature
        digestAlgorithm:
          type: string
          description: Digest algorithm used
        digestValue:
          type: string
          description: Digest value
        validationWarnings:
          type: array
          items:
            type: string
          nullable: true
          description: Warnings during validation
        validationErrors:
          type: array
          items:
            type: string
          nullable: true
          description: Errors during validation
      required:
        - signatureType
        - signatureLevel
        - trustChain
        - byteRange
        - digestAlgorithm
        - digestValue

    TrustChainCertificate:
      type: object
      properties:
        subject:
          type: string
          description: Certificate subject (DN)
        issuer:
          type: string
          description: Certificate issuer (DN)
        serialNumber:
          type: string
          description: Certificate serial number
        isTrusted:
          type: boolean
          description: Whether this certificate is trusted
        trustSource:
          type: string
          nullable: true
          description: Source of trust (e.g., "EU LOTL")
        qualified:
          type: boolean
          nullable: true
          description: Whether this is a qualified certificate
      required:
        - subject
        - issuer
        - serialNumber
        - isTrusted

    ComplianceAnalysisResponse:
      type: object
      properties:
        id:
          type: string
          format: uuid

        proposalId:
          type: string
          format: uuid
          description: Associated proposal ID
        status:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/AnalysisStatus'
        overallCompliance:
          type: number
          format: float
          minimum: 0
          maximum: 100
          description: Overall compliance percentage (0-100)
        technicalCompliance:
          type: number
          format: float
          minimum: 0
          maximum: 100
          description: Technical compliance percentage (0-100)
        financialCompliance:
          type: number
          format: float
          minimum: 0
          maximum: 100
          description: Financial compliance percentage (0-100)
        requirementsMet:
          type: integer
          description: Number of requirements met
        requirementsTotal:
          type: integer
          description: Total number of requirements
        complianceMatrix:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/ComplianceMatrixItem'

          description: AI-generated summary of compliance
        strengths:
          type: array
          items:
            type: string
          description: List of strengths identified
        weaknesses:
          type: array
          items:
            type: string
          description: List of weaknesses identified
        createdAt:
          type: string
          format: date-time

        updatedAt:
          type: string
          format: date-time

          format: date-time

          default: pt-PT

          type: boolean
          description: Whether to generate a summary
          default: true
        generateStrengthsWeaknesses:
          type: boolean
          description: Whether to generate strengths/weaknesses analysis
          default: true

    AnalysisStatus:
      type: string
      enum:
        - pending
        - processing
        - completed
        - error
      description: |
        Analysis status:
        - pending: Analysis not started
        - processing: Analysis in progress
        - completed: Analysis completed successfully
        - error: Error occurred during analysis

    ComplianceMatrixItem:
      type: object
      properties:
        requirementId:
          type: string
          format: uuid

        requirementText:
          type: string
          description: Text of the requirement

        status:

          maximum: 1

      description: |

        - complies: Fully complies with the requirement
        - partially_complies: Partially complies with the requirement
        - does_not_comply: Does not comply with the requirement
        - not_applicable: Requirement is not applicable
        - cannot_determine: Cannot determine compliance

          format: uuid

        pageNumber:

        confidence:

          format: float

          maximum: 1

        coordinates:

    ComplianceSummary:

        technicalCompliance:

          format: float

          maximum: 100

        financialCompliance:
          type: number
          format: float

          maximum: 100

        requirementsMet:
          type: integer

        requirementsTotal:
          type: integer
          description: Total number of requirements
        strengths:
          type: array
          items:

          description: Top strengths identified
        weaknesses:
          type: array
          items:

        recommendations:

        - requirementsTotal

          format: date-time
