        - type
        - version
        - status
        - createdAt
        - updatedAt

    ModelListResponse:
      type: object
      properties:
        data:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/ModelResponse'
        pagination:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/Pagination'
      required:
        - data
        - pagination

    ModelType:
      type: string
      enum:
        - document_classification
        - text_extraction
        - compliance_analysis
        - signature_validation
        - summarization
        - scoring
        - translation
      description: |
        Type of AI model:
        - document_classification: Classifies document types
        - text_extraction: Extracts text from documents
        - compliance_analysis: Analyzes compliance with requirements
        - signature_validation: Validates electronic signatures
        - summarization: Generates summaries
        - scoring: Scores proposals
        - translation: Translates text

    ModelStatus:
      type: string
      enum:
        - development
        - testing
        - deployed
        - deprecated
        - retired
      description: |
        Model status:
        - development: Model is under development
        - testing: Model is being tested
        - deployed: Model is in production
        - deprecated: Model is deprecated
        - retired: Model is retired

    ModelPerformance:
      type: object
      properties:
        accuracy:
          type: number
          format: float
          nullable: true
          minimum: 0
          maximum: 1
        precision:
          type: number
          format: float
          nullable: true
          minimum: 0
          maximum: 1
        recall:
          type: number
          format: float
          nullable: true
          minimum: 0
          maximum: 1
        f1Score:
          type: number
          format: float
          nullable: true
          minimum: 0
          maximum: 1
        agreementRate:
          type: number
          format: float
          nullable: true
          minimum: 0
          maximum: 1
        averageProcessingTime:
          type: number
          format: float
          nullable: true
          description: Average processing time in seconds
        lastEvaluated:
          type: string
          format: date-time
          nullable: true
          description: When the model was last evaluated

    ModelCardResponse:
      type: object
      properties:
        modelId:
          type: string
          format: uuid
          description: Unique model identifier
        modelName:
          type: string
          description: Model name
        modelVersion:
          type: string
          description: Model version
        description:
          type: string
          description: Model description
        owners:
          type: array
          items:
            type: string
          description: Model owners/contacts
        license:
          type: string
          description: Model license
        intendedUse:
          type: string
          description: Intended use cases
        limitations:
          type: array
          items:
            type: string
          description: Model limitations
        trainingData:
          type: string
          description: Description of training data
        evaluationData:
          type: string
          description: Description of evaluation data
        metrics:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/ModelMetrics'
        ethicalConsiderations:
          type: array
          items:
            type: string
          description: Ethical considerations
        createdAt:
          type: string
          format: date-time
          description: When the model card was created
        updatedAt:
          type: string
          format: date-time
          description: When the model card was last updated
      required:
        - modelId
        - modelName
        - modelVersion
        - description
        - owners
        - license
        - intendedUse
        - limitations
        - trainingData
        - evaluationData
        - metrics
        - createdAt
        - updatedAt

    ModelMetrics:
      type: object
      properties:
        performanceMetrics:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/PerformanceMetric'
        fairnessMetrics:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/FairnessMetric'
        robustnessMetrics:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/RobustnessMetric'
        lastEvaluated:
          type: string
          format: date-time
          description: When the metrics were last evaluated

    PerformanceMetric:
      type: object
      properties:
        name:
          type: string
          description: Metric name
        value:
          type: number
          format: float
          description: Metric value
        description:
          type: string
          description: Metric description
        threshold:
          type: number
          format: float
          nullable: true
          description: Acceptable threshold for this metric
      required:
        - name
        - value
        - description

    FairnessMetric:
      type: object
      properties:
        name:
          type: string
          description: Metric name
        value:
          type: number
          format: float
          description: Metric value
        description:
          type: string
          description: Metric description
        group:
          type: string
          description: Group this metric applies to
        threshold:
          type: number
          format: float
          nullable: true
          description: Acceptable threshold for this metric
      required:
        - name
        - value
        - description
        - group

    RobustnessMetric:
      type: object
      properties:
        name:
          type: string
          description: Metric name
        value:
          type: number
          format: float
          description: Metric value
        description:
          type: string
          description: Metric description
        scenario:
          type: string
          description: Scenario this metric applies to
        threshold:
          type: number
          format: float
          nullable: true
          description: Acceptable threshold for this metric
      required:
        - name
        - value
        - description
        - scenario

    ModelFeedbackRequest:
      type: object
      properties:
        rating:
          type: integer
          minimum: 1
          maximum: 5
          description: Rating from 1 (poor) to 5 (excellent)
        comments:
          type: string
          description: Detailed feedback comments
        correction:
          type: object
          description: Correction to model output
          additionalProperties: true
        context:
          type: string
          description: Context in which the model was used
        operationId:
          type: string
          format: uuid
          nullable: true
          description: ID of the operation this feedback relates to
        proposalId:
          type: string
          format: uuid
          nullable: true
          description: ID of the proposal this feedback relates to
      required:
        - rating
        - comments

    ModelFeedbackResponse:
      type: object
      properties:
        id:
          type: string
          format: uuid
          description: Unique feedback identifier
        modelId:
          type: string
          format: uuid
          description: Model this feedback applies to
        userId:
          type: string
          format: uuid
          description: User who provided the feedback
        rating:
          type: integer
          description: Rating from 1 (poor) to 5 (excellent)
        comments:
          type: string
          description: Feedback comments
        status:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/FeedbackStatus'
        createdAt:
          type: string
          format: date-time
          description: When the feedback was created
        processedAt:
          type: string
          format: date-time
          nullable: true
          description: When the feedback was processed
      required:
        - id
        - modelId
        - userId
        - rating
        - comments
        - status
        - createdAt

    FeedbackStatus:
      type: string
      enum:
        - received
        - reviewed
        - incorporated
        - rejected
      description: |
        Feedback processing status:
        - received: Feedback received but not reviewed
        - reviewed: Feedback has been reviewed
        - incorporated: Feedback has been incorporated into model
        - rejected: Feedback has been rejected

    AsyncOperationResponse:
      type: object
      properties:
        operationId:
          type: string
          format: uuid
          description: Unique operation identifier
        status:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/OperationStatus'
        type:
          type: string
          description: Type of operation
        createdAt:
          type: string
          format: date-time
          description: When the operation was created
        updatedAt:
          type: string
          format: date-time
          description: When the operation was last updated
        progress:
          type: number
          format: float
          nullable: true
          minimum: 0
          maximum: 1
          description: Progress (0-1)
        result:
          type: object
          nullable: true
          description: Operation result (when completed)
        error:
          type: string
          nullable: true
          description: Error message (if operation failed)
        estimatedCompletion:
          type: string
          format: date-time
          nullable: true
          description: Estimated completion time
      required:
        - operationId
        - status
        - type
        - createdAt
        - updatedAt

    OperationStatus:
      type: string
      enum:
        - pending
        - processing
        - completed
        - failed
        - cancelled
      description: |
        Asynchronous operation status:
        - pending: Operation is queued
        - processing: Operation is being processed
        - completed: Operation completed successfully
        - failed: Operation failed
        - cancelled: Operation was cancelled

```json
{
  "files": [
    {
      "path": "infrastructure/README.md",
      "content": "# BIA - AI Bot for Public Procurement

## Infrastructure Overview

This repository contains the Docker-based infrastructure for deploying the BIA system, an AI-powered platform for public procurement analysis. The system is designed for hybrid cloud/on-premises deployment with containerized microservices.

## Prerequisites

- Docker Engine (v24.0+)
- Docker Compose (v2.20+)
- Minimum 16GB RAM (32GB recommended for production)
- 100GB+ disk space for persistent volumes

## Architecture Components

1. **Reverse Proxy**: Traefik (public entry point with TLS support)
2. **Frontend**: React-based web interface
3. **Backend**: Spring Boot microservice
4. **AI Engine**: LLM-based processing service
5. **OCR Service**: Document processing
6. **Signature Validator**: Electronic signature verification
7. **Database**: PostgreSQL (persistent storage)
8. **Message Broker**: RabbitMQ (async processing)
9. **Vector DB**: Qdrant (semantic search)
10. **Cache**: Redis
11. **Monitoring**: Prometheus + Grafana

## Environment Configuration

1. Copy `.env.example` to `.env`
2. Configure all required variables (see `.env.example`)
3. For production, generate proper TLS certificates

## Running the System

### Development Mode
```bash
# Start all services
docker-compose up -d

# View logs
docker-compose logs -f [service]

# Stop services
docker-compose down
```

### Production Mode
```bash
# Build production images
docker-compose -f docker-compose.yml build

# Start with production configuration
docker-compose -f docker-compose.yml up -d
```

## Network Architecture

The system uses two Docker networks:
- `bia_public`: For public-facing traffic (Traefik, Frontend)
- `bia_private`: For internal service communication

See [networks.md](networks.md) for detailed topology.

## Service Endpoints

| Service               | Internal Port | Public Route (via Traefik)       |
|-----------------------|---------------|-----------------------------------|
| Frontend              | 3000          | https://localhost                 |
| Backend API           | 8080          | https://localhost/api             |
| AI Engine             | 5000          | (internal only)                   |
| OCR Service           | 5001          | (internal only)                   |
| Signature Validator    | 5002          | (internal only)                   |
| Traefik Dashboard     | 8080          | https://localhost/dashboard       |

## Persistent Volumes

| Volume          | Purpose                          | Mount Point               |
|-----------------|----------------------------------|---------------------------|
| postgres_data   | Database storage                 | /var/lib/postgresql/data  |
| rabbitmq_data   | Message broker storage           | /var/lib/rabbitmq         |
| qdrant_data     | Vector database storage          | /var/lib/qdrant          |
| uploads         | Document uploads                  | /app/uploads              |
| grafana_data    | Monitoring dashboards            | /var/lib/grafana         |
| prometheus_data | Monitoring metrics               | /prometheus               |

## Security Notes

1. All internal communication uses private Docker networks
2. Database and message broker are not exposed publicly
3. TLS is configured for all public endpoints
4. Sensitive data is stored encrypted at rest
5. Audit logs are immutable and regularly backed up

## Monitoring

Access Grafana dashboards at:
- URL: https://localhost/monitoring
- Default credentials (change after first login):
  - Username: `admin`
  - Password: `admin`

## Backup Procedure

```bash
# Create backup
docker exec postgres pg_dumpall -U ${POSTGRES_USER} > backup.sql

# Restore backup
cat backup.sql | docker exec -i postgres psql -U ${POSTGRES_USER}
```

## Scaling

The system supports horizontal scaling for:
- Backend services
- AI Engine workers
- OCR processing

Use `docker-compose scale` or Kubernetes HPA in production.

## Troubleshooting

1. **502 Bad Gateway**: Verify Traefik network binding
2. **Database connection issues**: Check `postgres/healthcheck.sh`
3. **Message queue problems**: Verify RabbitMQ with `rabbitmqctl status`

For detailed troubleshooting, see the [deployment guide](docs/deployment-guide.md)."
    },
    {
      "path": "infrastructure/networks.md",
      "content": "# BIA Network Architecture

## Network Topology

```mermaid
graph TD
    subgraph Public Network [bia_public]
        A[Traefik] -->|routes| B[Frontend]
        A -->|routes| C[Backend API]
        D[External User] -->|HTTPS| A
    end

    subgraph Private Network [bia_private]
        C -->|gRPC| E[AI Engine]
        C -->|REST| F[OCR Service]
        C -->|REST| G[Signature Validator]
        C -->|SQL| H[PostgreSQL]
        C -->|AMQP| I[RabbitMQ]
        C -->|HTTP| J[Qdrant]
        C -->|Redis| K[Redis]
        E -->|vector| J
        F -->|docs| C
        G -->|results| C
    end

    subgraph Monitoring
        L[Prometheus] -->|scrape| C
        L -->|scrape| E
        L -->|scrape| H
        L -->|scrape| I
        M[Grafana] -->|query| L
    end
```

## Network Configuration

### 1. Public Network (`bia_public`)
- **Purpose**: Public-facing traffic routing
- **Services**:
  - Traefik (reverse proxy)
  - Frontend
- **CIDR**: 172.20.0.0/24
- **Access Control**:
  - Only Traefik exposes ports to host (80, 443)
  - All other services accessible only via Traefik routing

### 2. Private Network (`bia_private`)
- **Purpose**: Internal service communication
- **Services**: All microservices and databases
- **CIDR**: 172.21.0.0/24
- **Access Control**:
  - No direct host exposure
  - Service-to-service communication only
  - Database access restricted to backend services

## Security Zones

| Zone          | Network       | Services                          | Access Level          |
|---------------|---------------|-----------------------------------|-----------------------|
| Public        | bia_public     | Traefik, Frontend                 | Internet-facing       |
| Application   | bia_private    | Backend, AI Engine, OCR, Validator | Internal only        |
| Data          | bia_private    | PostgreSQL, RabbitMQ, Qdrant, Redis | Restricted access   |
| Monitoring    | bia_private    | Prometheus, Grafana               | Internal + auth      |

## Network Policies

1. **Public Network Rules**:
   - Only Traefik binds to host ports
   - Frontend accessible only via Traefik routes
   - No direct database access from public network

2. **Private Network Rules**:
   - Backend can access: PostgreSQL, RabbitMQ, Qdrant, Redis
   - AI Engine can access: Qdrant, RabbitMQ
   - OCR/Signature services can access: RabbitMQ
   - Monitoring services can scrape all components

3. **Isolation Requirements**:
   - Database containers never attached to public network
   - Message broker restricted to backend services
   - Vector DB accessible only by AI components

## DNS Configuration

Internal service discovery uses Docker DNS:
- Services can resolve each other by container name
- Example: `backend` → resolves to backend container IP
- Example: `postgres` → resolves to database container IP

## Port Allocation

| Service          | Internal Port | Protocol | Public Exposure |
|------------------|---------------|----------|------------------|
| Traefik          | 80            | HTTP     | Yes (80)        |
| Traefik          | 443           | HTTPS    | Yes (443)       |
| Traefik Dashboard| 8080          | HTTP     | No (internal)   |
| Frontend         | 3000          | HTTP     | Via Traefik      |
| Backend          | 8080          | HTTP     | Via Traefik      |
| AI Engine        | 5000          | HTTP     | No               |
| OCR Service      | 5001          | HTTP     | No               |
| Signature Validator | 5002       | HTTP     | No               |
| PostgreSQL       | 5432          | TCP      | No               |
| RabbitMQ         | 5672          | AMQP     | No               |
| RabbitMQ Mgmt    | 15672         | HTTP     | No               |
| Qdrant           | 6333          | HTTP     | No               |
| Redis            | 6379          | TCP      | No               |
| Prometheus       | 9090          | HTTP     | Via Traefik      |
| Grafana          | 3000          | HTTP     | Via Traefik      |

## Traffic Flow

1. **User Requests**:
   - HTTPS → Traefik (port 443) → Frontend/Backend

2. **API Calls**:
   - Frontend → Backend (via Traefik routing)

3. **Async Processing**:
   - Backend → RabbitMQ → Worker Services → Results to Backend

4. **Data Access**:
   - Backend → PostgreSQL (direct connection)
   - AI Engine → Qdrant (vector operations)

5. **Monitoring**:
   - All services → Prometheus (metrics)
   - Grafana → Prometheus (visualization)

## Firewall Recommendations

For production deployments:

1. Host firewall rules:
   ```bash
   # Allow public HTTP/HTTPS
   sudo ufw allow 80/tcp
   sudo ufw allow 443/tcp
   
   # Allow SSH for administration
   sudo ufw allow 22/tcp
   
   # Deny all other incoming
   sudo ufw default deny incoming
   ```

2. Container-level restrictions:
   - Use Docker `--network` flags to enforce network attachment
   - Implement network policies in Kubernetes environments

## Performance Considerations

1. **Bandwidth**:
   - Public network: Minimum 100Mbps for user traffic
   - Private network: Minimum 1Gbps for inter-service communication

2. **Latency**:
   - All critical services on same private network
   - Database and message broker co-located with compute

3. **Isolation**:
   - CPU/memory limits configured per service
   - Noisy neighbors isolated (e.g., OCR processing)

## Failure Scenarios

| Scenario                     | Impact                          | Mitigation                          |
|------------------------------|---------------------------------|-------------------------------------|
| Public network failure        | No user access                  | Traefik health checks + retries      |
| Private network partition     | Service communication failure   | Circuit breakers + timeouts         |
| Database network isolation    | Data access failure             | Connection pooling + retries         |
| Message broker unreachable    | Async processing stalls        | Queue persistence + dead letter      |

## Network Diagnostics

Common diagnostic commands:

```bash
# Check network connectivity between containers
docker exec backend ping postgres

# View network inspect details
docker network inspect bia_private

# Check Traefik routing configuration
docker logs traefik

# Test internal DNS resolution
docker exec backend cat /etc/resolv.conf
```"

# BIA - AI Bot for Public Procurement
# Environment Configuration
# ============================================

# --------------------------------------------
# General Configuration
# --------------------------------------------

# Deployment environment (development|staging|production)
ENVIRONMENT=development

# --------------------------------------------
# Traefik Reverse Proxy
# --------------------------------------------

# Domain for public access (set to localhost for development)
TRAEFIK_DOMAIN=localhost

# HTTP port (redirects to HTTPS in production)
TRAEFIK_HTTP_PORT=80

# HTTPS port
TRAEFIK_HTTPS_PORT=443

# Traefik dashboard credentials (change these!)
TRAEFIK_DASHBOARD_USER=admin
TRAEFIK_DASHBOARD_PASSWORD=changeme

# --------------------------------------------
# Database Configuration
# --------------------------------------------

# PostgreSQL
POSTGRES_DB=bia_db
POSTGRES_USER=bia_user
POSTGRES_PASSWORD=changeme_secure_password
POSTGRES_ROOT_PASSWORD=changeme_root_password
POSTGRES_PORT=5432

# Connection pool settings
POSTGRES_MAX_POOL_SIZE=20
POSTGRES_IDLE_TIMEOUT=30000

# --------------------------------------------
# Message Broker (RabbitMQ)
# --------------------------------------------

RABBITMQ_DEFAULT_USER=bia_user
RABBITMQ_DEFAULT_PASS=changeme_rabbit_password
RABBITMQ_PORT=5672
RABBITMQ_MANAGEMENT_PORT=15672

# Queue names
RABBITMQ_DOCUMENT_QUEUE=document_processing
RABBITMQ_SIGNATURE_QUEUE=signature_validation
RABBITMQ_COMPLIANCE_QUEUE=compliance_analysis
RABBITMQ_REPORT_QUEUE=report_generation

# --------------------------------------------
# Redis Cache
# --------------------------------------------

REDIS_PASSWORD=changeme_redis_password
REDIS_PORT=6379

# --------------------------------------------
# Vector Database (Qdrant)
# --------------------------------------------

QDRANT_PORT=6333
QDRANT_STORAGE_PATH=/var/lib/qdrant

# --------------------------------------------
# Backend Service
# --------------------------------------------

# JWT Configuration
JWT_SECRET=generate_a_strong_secret_here_with_at_least_64_characters
JWT_EXPIRATION_MINUTES=60
JWT_REFRESH_EXPIRATION_DAYS=7

# API Rate Limiting
API_RATE_LIMIT=1000
API_RATE_LIMIT_WINDOW_MINUTES=15

# File Upload Limits
MAX_FILE_SIZE_MB=50
ALLOWED_FILE_TYPES=.pdf,.doc,.docx,.xlsx

# --------------------------------------------
# AI Engine Configuration
# --------------------------------------------

# LLM Configuration
LLM_MODEL_NAME=mistralai/Mistral-7B-Instruct-v0.1
LLM_QUANTIZE=bitsandbytes
LLM_MAX_NEW_TOKENS=1024
LLM_TEMPERATURE=0.1

# RAG Configuration
RAG_TOP_K=5
RAG_CHUNK_SIZE=512
RAG_CHUNK_OVERLAP=100

# --------------------------------------------
# OCR Service Configuration
# --------------------------------------------

OCR_LANGUAGES=por,eng
OCR_DPI=300
OCR_OUTPUT_FORMAT=txt

# --------------------------------------------
# Signature Validator Configuration
# --------------------------------------------

# EU Trusted Lists Configuration
LOTL_URL=https://ec.europa.eu/tools/lotl/eu-lotl.xml
LOTL_CACHE_MINUTES=1440

# OCSP/CRL Configuration
OCSP_TIMEOUT_SECONDS=30
CRL_CACHE_HOURS=24

# --------------------------------------------
# Frontend Configuration
# --------------------------------------------

# Application Title
APP_TITLE="BIA - AI Bot for Public Procurement"

# Default Language
DEFAULT_LANGUAGE=pt

# Supported Languages
SUPPORTED_LANGUAGES=pt,en

# --------------------------------------------
# Azure AD Integration (for production)
# --------------------------------------------

# Uncomment and configure for Azure AD SSO
# AZURE_AD_TENANT_ID=
# AZURE_AD_CLIENT_ID=
# AZURE_AD_CLIENT_SECRET=
# AZURE_AD_REDIRECT_URI=http://localhost/auth/callback

# --------------------------------------------
# Monitoring Configuration
# --------------------------------------------

# Prometheus
PROMETHEUS_PORT=9090
PROMETHEUS_SCRAPE_INTERVAL=15s
PROMETHEUS_RETENTION_DAYS=30

# Grafana
GRAFANA_PORT=3000
GRAFANA_ADMIN_USER=admin
GRAFANA_ADMIN_PASSWORD=admin  # Change this!

# --------------------------------------------
# Storage Configuration
# --------------------------------------------

# Document storage
DOCUMENT_STORAGE_PATH=/app/uploads
MAX_STORAGE_GB=100

# Backup configuration
BACKUP_SCHEDULE="0 2 * * *"  # Daily at 2AM
BACKUP_RETENTION_DAYS=30

# --------------------------------------------
# Security Configuration
# --------------------------------------------

# Encryption
ENCRYPTION_KEY=generate_a_32_byte_base64_key_here

# CORS Configuration
ALLOWED_ORIGINS=http://localhost,http://localhost:3000,https://localhost

# --------------------------------------------
# Logging Configuration
# --------------------------------------------

LOG_LEVEL=info
LOG_FORMAT=json
LOG_RETENTION_DAYS=30
AUDIT_LOG_RETENTION_YEARS=5

# --------------------------------------------
# Performance Tuning
# --------------------------------------------

# Container resource limits
BACKEND_MEMORY_LIMIT=4g
BACKEND_CPU_LIMIT=2

AI_ENGINE_MEMORY_LIMIT=8g
AI_ENGINE_CPU_LIMIT=4

OCR_SERVICE_MEMORY_LIMIT=2g
OCR_SERVICE_CPU_LIMIT=1

# --------------------------------------------
# Email Configuration (for notifications)
# --------------------------------------------

# SMTP Configuration
# SMTP_HOST=
# SMTP_PORT=587
# SMTP_USER=
# SMTP_PASSWORD=
# SMTP_FROM=bia@yourdomain.com

# --------------------------------------------
# Feature Flags
# --------------------------------------------

# Enable/disable features
FEATURE_AUDIT_LOGGING=true
FEATURE_ADVANCED_SIGNATURE_VALIDATION=true
FEATURE_COMPARATIVE_ANALYSIS=true
FEATURE_AUTOMATIC_REPORT_GENERATION=true

# --------------------------------------------
# Development-Specific Configuration
# --------------------------------------------

# Hot reload for frontend
DEV_FRONTEND_HOT_RELOAD=true

# Debug logging
DEV_DEBUG_LOGGING=false

# Mock services (for testing without dependencies)
DEV_MOCK_AI_ENGINE=false
DEV_MOCK_SIGNATURE_VALIDATOR=false"

      "path": "infrastructure/docker-compose.yml",
      "content": "version: '3.8'

x-defaults: &default-config
  restart: unless-stopped
  networks:
    - bia_private
  logging:
    driver: json-file
    options:
      max-size: "10m"
      max-file: "3"

x-backend-deps: &backend-deps
  depends_on:
    postgres:
      condition: service_healthy
    rabbitmq:
      condition: service_healthy
    redis:
      condition: service_started
    qdrant:
      condition: service_started

x-ai-deps: &ai-deps
  depends_on:
    rabbitmq:
      condition: service_healthy
    qdrant:
      condition: service_started

x-public-service: &public-service
  networks:
    - bia_public
    - bia_private
  labels:
    - "traefik.enable=true"
    - "traefik.docker.network=bia_public"

x-monitoring: &monitoring
  labels:
    - "prometheus.scrape=true"
    - "prometheus.port=8080"

services:
  # Reverse Proxy
  traefik:
    <<: *default-config
    <<: *public-service
    image: traefik:v2.10
    container_name: traefik
    command:
      - "--api.insecure=true"
      - "--providers.docker=true"
      - "--providers.docker.exposedbydefault=false"
      - "--providers.file=true"
      - "--providers.file.filename=/etc/traefik/dynamic.yml"
      - "--providers.file.watch=true"
      - "--entrypoints.web.address=:80"
      - "--entrypoints.websecure.address=:443"
      - "--certificatesresolvers.letsencrypt.acme.email=${TRAEFIK_ACME_EMAIL:-admin@localhost}"
      - "--certificatesresolvers.letsencrypt.acme.storage=/letsencrypt/acme.json"
      - "--certificatesresolvers.letsencrypt.acme.httpchallenge=true"
      - "--certificatesresolvers.letsencrypt.acme.httpchallenge.entrypoint=web"
    ports:
      - "${TRAEFIK_HTTP_PORT:-80}:80"
      - "${TRAEFIK_HTTPS_PORT:-443}:443"
      - "8080:8080"  # Dashboard
    volumes:
      - /var/run/docker.sock:/var/run/docker.sock:ro
      - ./traefik/traefik.yml:/etc/traefik/traefik.yml:ro
      - ./traefik/config:/etc/traefik/config:ro
      - ./volumes/traefik/letsencrypt:/letsencrypt
    environment:
      - TRAEFIK_DASHBOARD_USER=${TRAEFIK_DASHBOARD_USER:-admin}
      - TRAEFIK_DASHBOARD_PASSWORD=${TRAEFIK_DASHBOARD_PASSWORD:-changeme}
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD", "traefik", "healthcheck", "--ping"
      interval: 10s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 3
    
  # Frontend Service
  frontend:
    <<: *default-config
    <<: *public-service
    <<: *monitoring
    build:
      context: ../../frontend
      dockerfile: ./infrastructure/frontend/Dockerfile
    container_name: frontend
    environment:
      - NODE_ENV=${ENVIRONMENT:-development}
      - REACT_APP_API_URL=/api
      - REACT_APP_AZURE_AD_ENABLED=${AZURE_AD_CLIENT_ID:+true}
      - REACT_APP_DEFAULT_LANGUAGE=${DEFAULT_LANGUAGE:-pt}
      - REACT_APP_SUPPORTED_LANGUAGES=${SUPPORTED_LANGUAGES:-pt,en}
      - REACT_APP_APP_TITLE=${APP_TITLE:-"BIA - AI Bot for Public Procurement"}
    labels:
      - "traefik.http.routers.frontend.rule=Host(`${TRAEFIK_DOMAIN:-localhost}`)"
      - "traefik.http.routers.frontend.entrypoints=websecure"
      - "traefik.http.routers.frontend.tls=true"
      - "traefik.http.routers.frontend.tls.certresolver=letsencrypt"
      - "traefik.http.services.frontend.loadbalancer.server.port=3000"
      - "traefik.http.routers.frontend.middlewares=frontend-headers"
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD", "curl", "-f", "http://localhost:3000"]
      interval: 30s
      timeout: 10s
      retries: 3

  # Backend Service
  backend:
    <<: *default-config
    <<: *backend-deps
    <<: *monitoring
    build:
      context: ../../backend
      dockerfile: ./infrastructure/backend/Dockerfile
    container_name: backend
    environment:
      - SPRING_PROFILES_ACTIVE=${ENVIRONMENT:-development}
      - SPRING_DATASOURCE_URL=jdbc:postgresql://postgres:5432/${POSTGRES_DB:-bia_db}
      - SPRING_DATASOURCE_USERNAME=${POSTGRES_USER:-bia_user}
      - SPRING_DATASOURCE_PASSWORD=${POSTGRES_PASSWORD:-changeme_secure_password}
      - SPRING_RABBITMQ_HOST=rabbitmq
      - SPRING_RABBITMQ_PORT=${RABBITMQ_PORT:-5672}
      - SPRING_RABBITMQ_USERNAME=${RABBITMQ_DEFAULT_USER:-bia_user}
      - SPRING_RABBITMQ_PASSWORD=${RABBITMQ_DEFAULT_PASS:-changeme_rabbit_password}
      - SPRING_REDIS_HOST=redis
      - SPRING_REDIS_PORT=${REDIS_PORT:-6379}
      - SPRING_REDIS_PASSWORD=${REDIS_PASSWORD:-changeme_redis_password}
      - QDRANT_HOST=qdrant
      - QDRANT_PORT=${QDRANT_PORT:-6333}
      - JWT_SECRET=${JWT_SECRET:-generate_a_strong_secret_here_with_at_least_64_characters}
      - JWT_EXPIRATION_MINUTES=${JWT_EXPIRATION_MINUTES:-60}
      - AZURE_AD_TENANT_ID=${AZURE_AD_TENANT_ID:-}
      - AZURE_AD_CLIENT_ID=${AZURE_AD_CLIENT_ID:-}
      - AZURE_AD_CLIENT_SECRET=${AZURE_AD_CLIENT_SECRET:-}
      - DOCUMENT_STORAGE_PATH=${DOCUMENT_STORAGE_PATH:-/app/uploads}
      - MAX_FILE_SIZE_MB=${MAX_FILE_SIZE_MB:-50}
      - ALLOWED_FILE_TYPES=${ALLOWED_FILE_TYPES:-.pdf,.doc,.docx,.xlsx}
      - LOG_LEVEL=${LOG_LEVEL:-info}
    volumes:
      - ./volumes/uploads:${DOCUMENT_STORAGE_PATH:-/app/uploads}
    labels:
      - "traefik.enable=true"
      - "traefik.docker.network=bia_public"
      - "traefik.http.routers.backend.rule=Host(`${TRAEFIK_DOMAIN:-localhost}`) && PathPrefix(`/api`)"
      - "traefik.http.routers.backend.entrypoints=websecure"
      - "traefik.http.routers.backend.tls=true"
      - "traefik.http.routers.backend.tls.certresolver=letsencrypt"
      - "traefik.http.services.backend.loadbalancer.server.port=8080"
      - "traefik.http.routers.backend.middlewares=backend-stripprefix,backend-headers"
      - "traefik.http.middlewares.backend-stripprefix.stripprefix.prefixes=/api"
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD", "curl", "-f", "http://localhost:8080/actuator/health"]
      interval: 30s
      timeout: 10s
      retries: 3

  # AI Engine Service
  ai-engine:
    <<: *default-config
    <<: *ai-deps
    <<: *monitoring
    build:
      context: ../../ai-engine
      dockerfile: ./infrastructure/ai-engine/Dockerfile
    container_name: ai-engine
    environment:
      - ENVIRONMENT=${ENVIRONMENT:-development}
      - LLM_MODEL_NAME=${LLM_MODEL_NAME:-mistralai/Mistral-7B-Instruct-v0.1}
      - LLM_QUANTIZE=${LLM_QUANTIZE:-bitsandbytes}
      - LLM_MAX_NEW_TOKENS=${LLM_MAX_NEW_TOKENS:-1024}
      - LLM_TEMPERATURE=${LLM_TEMPERATURE:-0.1}
      - RAG_TOP_K=${RAG_TOP_K:-5}
      - RAG_CHUNK_SIZE=${RAG_CHUNK_SIZE:-512}
      - RAG_CHUNK_OVERLAP=${RAG_CHUNK_OVERLAP:-100}
      - QDRANT_HOST=qdrant
      - QDRANT_PORT=${QDRANT_PORT:-6333}
      - RABBITMQ_HOST=rabbitmq
      - RABBITMQ_PORT=${RABBITMQ_PORT:-5672}
      - RABBITMQ_USER=${RABBITMQ_DEFAULT_USER:-bia_user}
      - RABBITMQ_PASSWORD=${RABBITMQ_DEFAULT_PASS:-changeme_rabbit_password}
      - RABBITMQ_COMPLIANCE_QUEUE=${RABBITMQ_COMPLIANCE_QUEUE:-compliance_analysis}
      - LOG_LEVEL=${LOG_LEVEL:-info}
    deploy:
      resources:
        limits:
          cpus: '${AI_ENGINE_CPU_LIMIT:-4}'
          memory: '${AI_ENGINE_MEMORY_LIMIT:-8g}'
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD", "/app/healthcheck.sh"]
      interval: 30s
      timeout: 15s
      retries: 3

  # OCR Service
  ocr-service:
    <<: *default-config
    <<: *ai-deps
    <<: *monitoring
    build:
      context: ../../ocr-service
      dockerfile: ./infrastructure/ocr-service/Dockerfile
    container_name: ocr-service
    environment:
      - OCR_LANGUAGES=${OCR_LANGUAGES:-por,eng}
      - OCR_DPI=${OCR_DPI:-300}
      - OCR_OUTPUT_FORMAT=${OCR_OUTPUT_FORMAT:-txt}
      - RABBITMQ_HOST=rabbitmq
      - RABBITMQ_PORT=${RABBITMQ_PORT:-5672}
      - RABBITMQ_USER=${RABBITMQ_DEFAULT_USER:-bia_user}
      - RABBITMQ_PASSWORD=${RABBITMQ_DEFAULT_PASS:-changeme_rabbit_password}
      - RABBITMQ_DOCUMENT_QUEUE=${RABBITMQ_DOCUMENT_QUEUE:-document_processing}
      - LOG_LEVEL=${LOG_LEVEL:-info}
    deploy:
      resources:
        limits:
          cpus: '${OCR_SERVICE_CPU_LIMIT:-1}'
          memory: '${OCR_SERVICE_MEMORY_LIMIT:-2g}'
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD", "/app/healthcheck.sh"]
      interval: 30s
      timeout: 10s
      retries: 3

  # Signature Validator Service
  signature-validator:
    <<: *default-config
    <<: *ai-deps
    <<: *monitoring
    build:
      context: ../../signature-validator
      dockerfile: ./infrastructure/signature-validator/Dockerfile
    container_name: signature-validator
    environment:
      - LOTL_URL=${LOTL_URL:-https://ec.europa.eu/tools/lotl/eu-lotl.xml}
      - LOTL_CACHE_MINUTES=${LOTL_CACHE_MINUTES:-1440}
      - OCSP_TIMEOUT_SECONDS=${OCSP_TIMEOUT_SECONDS:-30}
      - CRL_CACHE_HOURS=${CRL_CACHE_HOURS:-24}
      - RABBITMQ_HOST=rabbitmq
      - RABBITMQ_PORT=${RABBITMQ_PORT:-5672}
      - RABBITMQ_USER=${RABBITMQ_DEFAULT_USER:-bia_user}
      - RABBITMQ_PASSWORD=${RABBITMQ_DEFAULT_PASS:-changeme_rabbit_password}
      - RABBITMQ_SIGNATURE_QUEUE=${RABBITMQ_SIGNATURE_QUEUE:-signature_validation}
      - LOG_LEVEL=${LOG_LEVEL:-info}
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD", "/app/healthcheck.sh"]
      interval: 30s
      timeout: 10s
      retries: 3

  # Database
  postgres:
    <<: *default-config
    image: postgres:15-alpine
    container_name: postgres
    environment:
      - POSTGRES_DB=${POSTGRES_DB:-bia_db}
      - POSTGRES_USER=${POSTGRES_USER:-bia_user}
      - POSTGRES_PASSWORD=${POSTGRES_PASSWORD:-changeme_secure_password}
      - POSTGRES_INITDB_ARGS=--encoding=UTF8 --locale=pt_PT.utf8
    volumes:
      - ./postgres/init.sql:/docker-entrypoint-initdb.d/init.sql:ro
      - ./volumes/postgres/data:/var/lib/postgresql/data
      - ./postgres/healthcheck.sh:/usr/local/bin/healthcheck.sh
    ports:
      - "5432:5432"  # Exposed for local development only
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD-SHELL", "pg_isready -U ${POSTGRES_USER:-bia_user} -d ${POSTGRES_DB:-bia_db}"]
      interval: 10s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 5
    command: ["postgres", "-c", "max_connections=100", "-c", "shared_buffers=1GB"]

  # Message Broker
  rabbitmq:
    <<: *default-config
    image: rabbitmq:3.12-management-alpine
    container_name: rabbitmq
    environment:
      - RABBITMQ_DEFAULT_USER=${RABBITMQ_DEFAULT_USER:-bia_user}
      - RABBITMQ_DEFAULT_PASS=${RABBITMQ_DEFAULT_PASS:-changeme_rabbit_password}
    volumes:
      - ./rabbitmq/definitions.json:/etc/rabbitmq/definitions.json:ro
      - ./rabbitmq/rabbitmq.conf:/etc/rabbitmq/rabbitmq.conf:ro
      - ./volumes/rabbitmq/data:/var/lib/rabbitmq
    ports:
      - "5672:5672"    # AMQP
      - "15672:15672"  # Management UI
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD", "rabbitmq-diagnostics", "status"]
      interval: 10s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 5

  # Vector Database
  qdrant:
    <<: *default-config
    image: qdrant/qdrant:v1.7.0
    container_name: qdrant
    volumes:
      - ./qdrant/config.yaml:/etc/qdrant/config.yaml:ro
      - ./volumes/qdrant/data:/var/lib/qdrant
    ports:
      - "6333:6333"  # Exposed for local development only
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD", "curl", "-f", "http://localhost:6333/readyz"]
      interval: 10s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 5

  # Cache
  redis:
    <<: *default-config
    image: redis:7-alpine
    container_name: redis
    command: ["redis-server", "/usr/local/etc/redis/redis.conf"]
    volumes:
      - ./redis/redis.conf:/usr/local/etc/redis/redis.conf:ro
      - ./volumes/redis/data:/data
    ports:
      - "6379:6379"  # Exposed for local development only
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD", "redis-cli", "ping"]
      interval: 10s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 5

  # Monitoring
  prometheus:
    <<: *default-config
    <<: *public-service
    image: prom/prometheus:v2.47
    container_name: prometheus
    volumes:
      - ./monitoring/prometheus/prometheus.yml:/etc/prometheus/prometheus.yml:ro
      - ./volumes/prometheus/data:/prometheus
    command:
      - '--config.file=/etc/prometheus/prometheus.yml'
      - '--storage.tsdb.path=/prometheus'
      - '--web.console.libraries=/usr/share/prometheus/console_libraries'
      - '--web.console.templates=/usr/share/prometheus/consoles'
    labels:
      - "traefik.http.routers.prometheus.rule=Host(`${TRAEFIK_DOMAIN:-localhost}`) && PathPrefix(`/monitoring/prometheus`)"
      - "traefik.http.routers.prometheus.entrypoints=websecure"
      - "traefik.http.routers.prometheus.tls=true"
      - "traefik.http.routers.prometheus.tls.certresolver=letsencrypt"
      - "traefik.http.services.prometheus.loadbalancer.server.port=9090"
      - "traefik.http.routers.prometheus.middlewares=prometheus-stripprefix,prometheus-auth"
      - "traefik.http.middlewares.prometheus-stripprefix.stripprefix.prefixes=/monitoring/prometheus"
      - "traefik.http.middlewares.prometheus-auth.basicauth.users=${TRAEFIK_DASHBOARD_USER:-admin}:$$apr1$$7v2p3pX2$$u4Fk6Q5WZjNYl5rMZ/7sL/"
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD", "wget", "-qO-", "http://localhost:9090/-/healthy"]
      interval: 10s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 3

  grafana:
    <<: *default-config
    <<: *public-service
    image: grafana/grafana:10.2
    container_name: grafana
    depends_on:
      - prometheus
    volumes:
      - ./monitoring/grafana/datasources:/etc/grafana/provisioning/datasources:ro
      - ./monitoring/grafana/dashboards:/etc/grafana/provisioning/dashboards:ro
      - ./volumes/grafana/data:/var/lib/grafana
    environment:
      - GF_SECURITY_ADMIN_USER=${GRAFANA_ADMIN_USER:-admin}
      - GF_SECURITY_ADMIN_PASSWORD=${GRAFANA_ADMIN_PASSWORD:-admin}
      - GF_USERS_ALLOW_SIGN_UP=false
      - GF_AUTH_ANONYMOUS_ENABLED=false
    labels:
      - "traefik.http.routers.grafana.rule=Host(`${TRAEFIK_DOMAIN:-localhost}`) && PathPrefix(`/monitoring`)"
      - "traefik.http.routers.grafana.entrypoints=websecure"
      - "traefik.http.routers.grafana.tls=true"
      - "traefik.http.routers.grafana.tls.certresolver=letsencrypt"
      - "traefik.http.services.grafana.loadbalancer.server.port=3000"
      - "traefik.http.routers.grafana.middlewares=grafana-stripprefix,grafana-auth"
      - "traefik.http.middlewares.grafana-stripprefix.stripprefix.prefixes=/monitoring"
      - "traefik.http.middlewares.grafana-auth.basicauth.users=${TRAEFIK_DASHBOARD_USER:-admin}:$$apr1$$7v2p3pX2$$u4Fk6Q5WZjNYl5rMZ/7sL/"
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD", "wget", "-qO-", "http://localhost:3000/api/health"]
      interval: 10s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 3

# Networks
networks:
  bia_public:
    name: bia_public
    driver: bridge
    attachable: true
    internal: false
  
  bia_private:
    name: bia_private
    driver: bridge
    attachable: true
    internal: true

# Volumes
volumes:
  postgres_data:
    name: bia_postgres_data
  rabbitmq_data:
    name: bia_rabbitmq_data
  qdrant_data:
    name: bia_qdrant_data
  redis_data:
    name: bia_redis_data
  grafana_data:
    name: bia_grafana_data
  prometheus_data:
    name: bia_prometheus_data
  uploads:
    name: bia_uploads
  traefik_letsencrypt:
    name: bia_traefik_letsencrypt"
    },
    {
      "path": "infrastructure/traefik/traefik.yml",
      "content": "# Traefik Configuration

# Global configuration
global:
  checkNewVersion: false
  sendAnonymousUsage: false

# Entry Points configuration
entryPoints:
  web:
    address: ":80"
    http:
      redirections:
        entryPoint:
          to: websecure
          scheme: https
  websecure:
    address: ":443"
    http:
      tls:
        certResolver: letsencrypt
        domains:
          - main: "${TRAEFIK_DOMAIN:-localhost}"
            sans:
              - "*.${TRAEFIK_DOMAIN:-localhost}"

# API and dashboard configuration
api:
  insecure: true
  dashboard: true
  debug: ${ENVIRONMENT:-development} == "development"

# Docker provider configuration
providers:
  docker:
    endpoint: "unix:///var/run/docker.sock"
    exposedByDefault: false
    network: bia_public
    watch: true
    swarmMode: false
  file:
    filename: /etc/traefik/dynamic.yml
    watch: true

# Log configuration
log:
  level: ${LOG_LEVEL:-INFO}
  format: common

# Access log configuration
accessLog:
  filePath: "/var/log/traefik/access.log"
  format: json
  bufferingSize: 100
  filters:
    statusCodes: ["200", "300-302", "400-499", "500-599"]

# Certificates configuration
certificatesResolvers:
  letsencrypt:
    acme:
      email: ${TRAEFIK
